search_candidates.title: UNIQ Investor Relations - Ulima Nitra Tbk PT - Alpha Spread
search_candidates.content: Ulima Nitra Tbk PT Logo. # Ulima Nitra Tbk PT IDX:UNIQ. PT Ulima Nitra Tbk is an Indonesian service company that works on mining and construction projects. The company makes money by charging for contracted services, equipment use, and project-based work. That means its revenue depends on the amount of work it wins and how much equipment and labor it can keep busy. What makes the business easy to understand is that it sits in the middle of the project chain: it does the hands-on field work that many customers prefer to buy from a specialist instead of building in-house. The information on this site, and in its related newsletters, is not intended to be, nor does it constitute, investment advice or recommendations. Stock intrinsic value is the real worth of a company's stock, based on its financial health and performance. By focusing on the company's actual financial strength, like its earnings and debts, we can make better decisions about which stocks to buy and when.
